name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
note: Shows one badge per prompt slot with a colon bar chart of its character count. Each colon = 4000 chars (~1000 tokens). Click any badge to refresh.

rules.name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
rules.note: Step 1 — snapshot the context stack as tab-separated rows (identifier, char count). Step 2 — map each row into a labelled bar and split the result into per-slot badges.

actions.note: Each line becomes one badge: 'worldInfoBefore :::.' — each colon is 4000 chars, dot = >20% of a bucket
